_note: etcd's Range RPC is a key-range READ, but its name is not a read-verb, so the compiler conservatively classifies it as a mutation. This is intended: effect is proven from the name, never guessed. A real etcd manifest would declare Range a read via x-anvil-effect. Pinning it here documents the conservative default so a future 'helpful' heuristic that silently promotes Range to read trips this differential.
